reference: I am suffering from severe pain in my left shoulder and left chest. The pain is so intense that I am unable to breathe properly. It hurts when I take a deep breath. When I lean or change my position, the pain increases for ten to fifteen seconds, and then it becomes normal. Please help.
text: I am suffering from severe pain in my left shoulder and left chest. The pain is so intense that I am unable to breathe properly, and hurts my breath. When I lean or change my position, the pain increases for ten to fifteen seconds, and then it becomes normal. Please help.
